topic: Review briefing on the 2022/23 annual review of Te Reo Whakapuaki Irirangi (Māori Broadcasting Funding Agency) Te Reo Whakapuaki Irirangi
description: Wednesday 18 September 2024 | Māori Affairs Committee Review briefing on the 2022/23 annual review of Te Reo Whakapuaki Irirangi (Māori Broadcasting Funding Agency) Te Reo Whakapuaki Irirangi Hearings of evidence List of Submitters: -Dr Eruera Tarena, Te Māngai Pāho Chair -Paraone Gloyne, Te Māngai Pāho Deputy Chair -Tamalene Painting, Te Māngai Pāho Board member -Brian Morris, Te Māngai Pāho Board member -Larry Parr, Kaihautū – Chief Executive -Wi-Tako Love, Hautū Te Hāpai Ō – Manager - Finance, HR and Strategy -Jess Tawhiri, Hautū Te Toko Kōrero – Manager - Communications -Nadia Marsh, Hautū Te Hua Waihanga – Manager - Content -Ruth Katene, Hautū Te Whiringa – Manager - Funding -Ruiha Anderson, Hautū Te Hiringa – Manager – Systems, Reporting and Data Review briefing on the 2022/23 annual review of Te Aratuku Whakaata Irirangi Māori (Māori Television Service) Hearings of evidence List of Submitters: -Jaime Tuuta, Toihau o Te Rūnanga Kaiwhakatere o Whakaata Māori | Chair, Board of Directors -Shane Taurima, Kaihautū | Chief Executive -Sumeet Bhanot, Kaiurungi Ahumoni | Director of Finance -Maria Barlow, Kaiurungi Pāpāho | Director of Content & Audience Engagement -Hiria Pointon, Kaiurungi Toi Tangata | Director of People, Language & Culture
